WeakPoison.name: Weak Poison
WeakPoison.description: Takes fixed {health} damage at the end of every round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round

Poison.name: Poison
Poison.description: Takes fixed {health} damage at the end of every round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round

StrongPoison.name: Strong Poison
StrongPoison.description: Takes fixed {health} damage at the end of every round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round
StrongPoison.flavorText: You feel like you could die at any moment

Burn.name: Burn
Burn.description: Takes {health} damage at the end of the round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round

IntenseBurn.name: Intense Burn
IntenseBurn.description: Takes {health} damage at the end of the round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round
IntenseBurn.flavorText: A fire that burns violently and fast

Bleeding.name: Bleeding
Bleeding.description: Takes damage equal to {health}% of max health at the end of the round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round, minimum of 1 damage
Bleeding.flavorText: You leave a trail of blood beneath your feet

IntenseBleeding.name: Intense Bleeding
IntenseBleeding.description: Takes damage equal to {health}% of max health at the end of the round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round, minimum of 1 damage
IntenseBleeding.flavorText: You are covered in your own blood

SevereBleeding.name: Severe Bleeding
SevereBleeding.description: Takes damage equal to {health}% of max health at the end of the round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round, minimum of 1 damage
SevereBleeding.flavorText: You have less then 10 minutes left...

ManaWell.name: Mana Well
ManaWell.description: Loses {mana} mana at the end of the round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round

ManaBleeding.name: Mana Bleeding
ManaBleeding.description: Loses mana equal to {mana}% of max mana at the end of the round, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round, minimum of 1

Combustion.name: Combustion
Combustion.description: Takes {health} damage when stack reaches 0, {stackCount} round(s) remaining, decreases by {decreaseStack} every round

CombustionBurn.name: Burning Insides
CombustionBurn.description: Takes {health} damage at the end of the round, also takes 5 extra damage when the stack reaches 0, lasts for {stackCount} round(s), decreases by {decreaseStack} every round
CombustionBurn.flavorText: Your skeleton and organs are burning, you have become a living bomb
